root.sql:
select sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_group_no , sc_lon_m_loan_card.membership_no , pka_com_function.fp_get_member_name (sc_lon_m_loan_card.membership_no ) as mem_name , sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_type , sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_contract_no , sc_lon_m_loan_card_detail.loan_payment_date , sc_lon_m_loan_card_detail.item_type_code , sc_lon_m_loan_card_detail.principal_balance , ('!date_2!'-TO_DATE(sc_lon_m_loan_card_detail.loan_payment_date,'DD/MM/YYYY')) as date_cal , pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate('!date_1!')as last_cal , pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate('!date_2!')as balance_date
, (select sc_lon_m_int_step_rate.loan_interest_rate from sc_lon_m_int_step_rate Where sc_lon_m_int_step_rate.loan_type = sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type and sc_lon_m_int_step_rate.effective_date =(Select Max( rate.effective_date ) from sc_lon_m_int_step_rate rate where rate.effective_date <= sc_lon_m_loan_card_detail.loan_payment_date and rate.loan_type = sc_lon_m_int_step_rate.loan_type ) ) as loan_interest_rate
, pka_lon_intsrv.fp_calint(sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_contract_no, '!date_2!' , sc_lon_m_loan_card_detail.principal_balance , sc_lon_m_loan_card_detail.loan_payment_date , 'PL' ) as int_calc
from sc_lon_m_loan_card , sc_lon_m_loan_card_detail , sc_lon_m_rule , sc_mem_m_membership_registered
where sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type = sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_type and sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_contract_no = sc_lon_m_loan_card_detail.loan_contract_no and sc_lon_m_loan_card.membership_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no and sc_lon_m_loan_card.principal_balance > 0 and sc_lon_m_loan_card_detail.item_type_code = 'PM' and sc_lon_m_loan_card_detail.loan_payment_date between '!date_1!' and '!date_2!' /*WHERE*/
